3053320.name: Fables Mosaic: Rapunzel
3053320.description:
Fable Mosaics: Rapunzel is the Second installment of old fables with a twist!. It features a collection of colored puzzles solved by logic, while following the Rapunzel Story. Are you ready to solve the puzzles as the story develops? Immerse yourself in this captivating nonogram mosaic game playing over 100 levels!

Key Game Features

100 unique levels
Rapunzel story with a twist!
Gallery of completed levels
Logic solving puzzles
Customizable tiles!
3053320.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
